title: satureja cristata subsp. orientalis
intro: Satureja cristata subsp. orientalis is a subspecies of the mountain savory plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja cristata subsp. orientalis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to support various health issues and promote overall well-being.
